You know, in terms of the actual deliverables, you know, while that can be blogs, not limited necessarily to blogs, how we structure our engagements is to start with what we call a strategy sprint phase, the six to eight week process where there's a lot of varying deliverables around just understanding the personas at a deep level, developing a rich roadmap, doing the necessary competitor gap analyses, starting to align with you on what it looks like to develop a really great set of pieces of content associated to that roadmap that just helps us really start to work with you on like what is going to be the most ideal strategy to help get to the outcomes you all need to get to.
